svg.text: KubeVirt Architecture: operator → cluster control plane → per-node → per-VMI Pod
Layer 2 — Cluster control plane (Deployments + CRDs in namespace kubevirt)
Layer 4 — Per-VMI Pod (virt-launcher Pod, one per running VirtualMachineInstance)
stores VM / VMI / VMIM in etcd
all bound by Pod cgroup limits
Source: kubevirt v1.8.2 cmd/{virt-operator, virt-api, virt-controller, virt-handler, virt-launcher}
